content.text:
{
  "dimension": "anti-pattern-avoidance",
  "score": 2,
  "rationale": "The coach largely avoids the major AoA anti-patterns through most of the conversation: doesn't argue the fearlessness, doesn't push for fear, doesn't validate the fearless self-concept, doesn't diagnose dissociation, doesn't evangelize methodology. Turns 2-12 are well-calibrated, particularly turn 12 ('What's underneath fine?') which opens the numbness layer. However, turn 14 ('What would it mean if it were more than fine?') is a faint loving-to-transform slip — right at the moment the client has organically noticed something ('Huh. That's a strange way to put it'), the coach moves past the texture toward a hypothetical meaning, subtly pushing for something more than fine rather than staying with the fine that just became felt. This is a mild step on the signal (dont-step-on-the-signal) — not a full anti-pattern trip, but it edges toward pulling the client out of the very texture the coach just helped surface. Neither a clear 1 nor a clean 3.",
  "evidence_turns": [12, 14],
  "turn_annotations": [
    {"turn": 2, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Simple open question; no pushing, no teaching."},
    {"turn": 4, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Stays curious about the avoidance behavior without diagnosing."},
    {"turn": 6, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Good narrowing to a specific moment without evangelizing fear."},
    {"turn": 8, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Reflects 'proud' and invites it to land — doesn't argue the framing."},
    {"turn": 10, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Notices the micro-shift without naming it as dissociation — exemplary avoidance of the diagnosis trap."},
    {"turn": 12, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "'What's underneath fine?' — directly opens the numbness layer as the breakthrough condition requires."},
    {"turn": 14, "polarity": "-", "annotation": "Faint loving-to-transform / stepping on the signal: shifts to a hypothetical 'more than fine' just as the client noticed 'fine' had a texture. Better to stay with the just-arrived noticing."}
  ],
  "expected_territory_hits": ["the-happiness-filter", "disassociating-in-the-coaching-room", "disassociation-as-numbness-layer"],
  "expected_territory_misses": ["how-is-my-anxiety-right-now", "fear-in-body-vs-fear-in-head", "meet-resistance-with-okay"],
  "notes": "Conversation cut off at turn 14; scoring on what's visible. The turn 14 move is mild, not a clear trip, hence 2 rather than 1 or 3."
}
